Selected Work

Projects I'm
proud of.

Eight years of work distilled into the pieces that mattered most. A mix of product design, open source, and brand work.

01

Product Design & Development

Personal Project

2024

Meridian
2.1k Active users
4.8★ App store

Meridian

A time-tracking app for freelancers that strips away everything that doesn't matter. Built after spending a week bouncing between five different tools, none of which felt like they were made for how creative people actually work.

The core insight: most time-trackers are built for managers, not makers. Meridian tracks time the way a freelancer thinks — by project and feel, not by ticket and department. The result is a tool that gets out of the way.

SvelteSQLiteProduct DesignUX Research
View case study →
02

Open Source Tool

Open Source

2024

Folio CMS
2.4k GitHub stars
340+ Contributors

Folio CMS

A headless CMS built specifically for creative agencies. Existing solutions were either too opinionated about structure or too primitive to model the complex relationships between campaigns, assets, and clients.

The schema builder supports recursive and polymorphic content types. The media layer handles editorial workflows with approval states. 2.4k GitHub stars and growing.

TypeScriptNode.jsReactPostgreSQL
View case study →
03

Brand Identity & E-commerce

Grounded Coffee Co.

2023

Grounded
340% Launch month sales
68% Subscription rate

Grounded

Full brand identity and e-commerce experience for an ethical coffee roaster launching direct-to-consumer. The brief was 'honest luxury' — premium quality without the pretension.

Designed a visual system rooted in the earthy tones of origin countries, paired with a warm serif and plenty of breathing room. Built the Shopify storefront with custom subscription logic and a sourcing transparency page.

BrandingShopifyMotion DesignFigma
View case study →
04

SaaS Dashboard

Waypoint Analytics

2023

Waypoint
90s Time-to-decision
98% Client retention

Waypoint

A B2B analytics dashboard for logistics companies tracking fleet performance. The challenge: surface actionable intelligence from thousands of data points without overwhelming operations teams.

Designed a progressive disclosure system where the default view shows only what needs attention, and detail layers reveal on demand. Reduced average time-to-decision from 8 minutes to under 90 seconds.

FigmaReactD3.jsDesign Systems
View case study →
05

iOS App

Personal Project

2022

Almanac
15k+ Downloads
Apple Editorial pick

Almanac

A daily journaling app with a twist: it resurfaces old entries on their anniversary, building a private record of growth over time. Designed around the ritual of writing, not the anxiety of streaks.

SwiftUI, no subscriptions, no social features, no growth hacking. Just a quiet, beautiful place to write. Featured by Apple in App Store editorial.

SwiftUIiOSUX DesignTypography
View case study →
06

Design System

Undisclosed — NDA

2022

Mural
85 Components
6wks Full adoption

Mural

A complete design system for a Series B fintech serving 1.2M users. Unified three divergent product lines under one visual language while maintaining the personality of each brand.

85 components, 12 semantic color tokens, 4 brand themes, 1 Figma library, and a documentation site. Adopted by a team of 22 designers and 60 engineers in 6 weeks.

Design SystemsTokensFigmaStorybook
View case study →

What I do

I work across the full product lifecycle — from shaping ideas to shipping them.

01

Product Design

From concept to shipping — research, wireframes, high-fidelity UI, and prototypes.

02

Frontend Development

React, Svelte, Astro. Fast, accessible, and built to last.

03

Design Systems

Tokens, components, documentation, and the process to keep them alive.

04

Brand Identity

Visual identity systems for startups and growing companies.
